extortion.description: Capozzi Adler, P.C. primarily serves the legal needs of healthcare and senior living providers that participate in the Medicaid and Medicare programs. Capozzi Adler, P.C.’s healthcare law services include: regulatory compliance & licensure, collections and Medicaid eligibility, CCRC licensure, admission agreements, guardianships, nursing facility sales & acquisitions, employment law & labor law, and Medicaid/ Medicare reimbursement appeals.
